title: West Africa Daily Intelligence Brief
executive_summary: Today's West Africa briefing is shaped primarily by politics, economy and security. Significant developments are concentrated in Niger, Mali, The Gambia, Ghana. Security pressures remain an important source of political and humanitarian risk; while economic policy and market conditions continue to influence investor confidence and household welfare.

learning.title: What fiscal reform means
learning.description: Fiscal reform involves changing government spending, taxation or borrowing to improve public finances. Although reforms may increase long-term stability, they can create short-term political pressure when subsidies are reduced or taxes rise.

methodology: Stories are collected from public Google News RSS searches, classified using keyword rules, filtered for near-duplicates and ranked using source quality, recency and political-risk relevance.
